message:
Running command: # Great progress! Parasitics estimated, but write_views.tcl tries to read_current_odb again!
# write_views.tcl sources io.tcl again which calls read_current_odb.
# We need to NOT source write_views.tcl - instead call the proc directly from io.tcl.
# The write_views proc is defined in io.tcl, not write_views.tcl!

grep -n "write_views\|proc write_views\|source.*write_views" \
    /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/common/io.tcl | head -5
echo "---"
cat /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/write_views.tcl
